reasoning: Attack the lactate clearance limiter by focusing on over-under intervals that push and recover around your threshold. In your last ride, you averaged 191W, showing room to push higher for Alpine Loop's sustained climb target. This workout will improve fatigue resistance and aerobic base to maintain power effectively over long climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets of 6 min: 3 min at 242-256W, 3 min at 201-218W

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
